action.reasoning: Observation: Training failed immediately on scheduler init due to deprecated 'verbose' arg in newer PyTorch (ReduceLROnPlateau). Baseline from iter5: mae_60min=6.5848 with val MAE improving to ~5.49 over 5 epochs; model (GCN-style with hidden=256) and predict.py are solid, dense adj works efficiently. Analysis: Simple fix removes the invalid kwarg; 20 epochs with scheduler and current capacity should further reduce error (esp. on 60min horizon) without OOM or overfitting given small N=207. Decision: Patch only the scheduler line in train.py, keep 20 epochs + logging, run training then submit_eval on best.pt for improved mae_60min and updated time measurement.
